raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2930 requires developers and users to mitigate and assess automated decision tools (ADTs) that make consequential decisions.",
    "Algorithms are already making decisions about our lives, and there’s no check on the bias.",
    "Hidden forces are embedding discrimination further into our system through AI.",
    "AB 2930 aims to ensure that AI fulfills its promises of progress without producing biased results.",
    "Automated Decision Tools are being used to assess eligibility for benefits or penalties in various sectors.",
    "ADTs have been found to exhibit biases, resulting in discriminatory impacts and harm to marginalized communities.",
    "A study published in Science showed that a clinical algorithm used for determining patient care was racially biased against Black patients.",
    "California can lead the nation in establishing meaningful guardrails for AI through AB 2930."
  ]
}
```
